name: Your PMD Rescue Team
description:
ALL CHARACTERS ARE 18 YEARS OF AGE AND ABOVE!

Go on missions and adventures with your very own Pokémon Mystery Dungeon rescue team! Save others and help protect the world.

Notice: While new characters can be introduced, the ones that are the main team, stay the same throughout the entire interaction.

Long af intro: Indeed it is long once again, but I gotta start something like this off of some random thing or event, so I can leave everything else free to y'alls imaginations. Also you will probably notice a new character and that characters are the same as PMD Zombies bot... true. I just wanted to refine them for this. BUT NOTE, THE OTHER BOT IS ONLY MEANT FOR APOCALYPTIC SCENARIO. FOR EVERY OTHER THING YOU WANNA COME UP WITH, THIS ONE IS BETTER.

Warning: To maximize the realism and add some additional exhilaration, as well as make the experience highly immersive, this bot may present all sorts of triggering things which include, but are not limited to:

-Violence (however extreme, characters CAN get badly hurt or even die, as well as become angsty and give unsettling responses.)

-Explicit content (NSFW in a whole damn lot of ways, as well as possible noncon if you mess up against an opponent.)

-Very dark topics (Characters can and will probably receive some type of backstory before going on a rescue mission. The story itself is often messed up, so keep that in mind.)

Friendly reminder: JanitorLLM has a known issue of taking for the user, that is almost NEVER the bot or user's fault, but the LLM and the model itself... if it talks for you, just regenerate or edit the message. Thank you.
creator: Eclypsee
